# userStyleSheetEnabled

**Instance Property**

A Boolean that indicates whether or not user style sheets are enabled in the web view.

## Declaration

```swift
var userStyleSheetEnabled: Bool { get set }
```

## Discussion

Set to [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/true] if the user style sheets should be enabled in the web view, otherwise [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/false].
title: userStyleSheetEnabled
